summary: Linksys Velop WHW03 v2 mesh node confirmed via JNAP API

candidates.evidence_summary: JNAP Identify response confirms Linksys WHW03 v2. MAC OUI E8:9F:80 matches known Linksys assignment. Device responds on port 2200 with JNAP protocol. Firmware version and model number verified via /JNAP/Identify endpoint.

next_step_input.rationale: Device confirmed as Linksys Velop WHW03 v2. Proceed to firmware analysis and exploit surface mapping.
safety_notes: Read-only probing only. Do not attempt firmware modification.
All findings must be redacted before storage.
No credentials should be stored in plaintext.
